zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan Pigot於1431年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯時，她的父親Randolph Pigot32歲，母親Margaret Plumpton23歲。她於1449年4月6日與Sir John Norton在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1488年8月6日在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾沃斯享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan Pigot于1431年出生在英国英格兰越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯时，她的父亲Randolph Pigot32岁，母亲Margaret Plumpton23岁。她于1449年4月6日与Sir John Norton在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1488年8月6日在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾沃斯享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Pigot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pickett
meanings: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Picot, Pigot, a pet form of Pic (see Pike 6). In Middle English, the form Piket (Old French Picquet) was also common.
sometimes a late development of   Pickard   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan Pigot was born in 1431, in Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Randolph Pigot, was 32 and her mother, Margaret Plumpton, was 23. She married Sir John Norton on 6 April 1449, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died on 6 August 1488, in Wath, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Wath, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan Pigot est née en 1431, à Norton Conyers, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Randolph Pigot, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Plumpton, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Norton le 6 avril 1449, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 août 1488, à Wath, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Wath, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan Pigot 1431 in Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Randolph Pigot 32 und ihre Mutter Margaret Plumpton 23. Sie hat am 6. April 1449 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Norton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. August 1488 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Wath, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wath, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Pigot è nata il nel 1431 nel Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Randolph Pigot, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Margaret Plumpton, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Norton il 6 aprile 1449, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 6 agosto 1488, nel Wath, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Wath, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Pigotが1431年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアノートン コニーエルズで生まれた時，父Randolph Pigotは32歳，母Margaret Plumptonは23歳であった。1449年4月6日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir John Nortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1488年8月6日にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアワスで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアワスにて埋葬された。

ko.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Pigot(이)가 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노르턴 코니어스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Randolph Pigot(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Plumpton(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1449년 4월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sir John Norton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1488년 8월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 왓h에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 왓h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Pigot nasceu em 1431, em Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Randolph Pigot, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Plumpton, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Norton em 6 de abril de 1449, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1488, em Wath, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Wath, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: шарпено, стритли вит шарпено, бедфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan Pigot родилась в 1431 г. в местности нортон кониирс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Randolph Pigot было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Plumpton, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Norton 6 апреля 1449 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 6 августа 1488 г. в местности ват, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности ват, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joan Pigot nació en 1431, en Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Randolph Pigot, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Plumpton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir John Norton el 6 de abril de 1449, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1488, en Wath, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Wath, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
